الرحلة — The Journey

The Rihla Journal

Stories, recipes, and traditions from the heart of Morocco.

TraditionsDecember 15, 2025

The Art of Moroccan Mint Tea

More than a drink, Moroccan mint tea is a ritual of hospitality. Learn the traditional atay preparation passed down through generations of Amazigh families.

5 min read
Spice Guide

Ras el Hanout: The King of Spice Blends

Every spice merchant has their secret recipe. We explore the history and 30+ ingredients that make up Morocco's most famous spice blend.

Nov 287 min read
Heritage

Argan Oil: Morocco's Liquid Gold

From the cooperatives of Essaouira to your kitchen. The story of how Amazigh women preserve the ancient tradition of argan oil production.

Nov 106 min read
Recipes

Tagine: Secrets of Slow Cooking

The conical clay pot that defines Moroccan cuisine. Master the techniques behind chicken tagine with preserved lemons and olives.

Oct 228 min read
Travel

A Food Tour Through the Fez Medina

Walking through the world's largest car-free urban area, discovering street food, bakeries, and centuries-old food traditions.

Oct 510 min read
Traditions

Friday Couscous: A Sacred Moroccan Tradition

Every Friday, Moroccan families gather around a shared platter of couscous. This communal meal is more than food – it's identity.

Sep 185 min read

Stay on the journey
